## Intellectual property and knowledge transfer

In 2013, intellectual property created by my group on data processing and visualisation for dairy reproduction data, co-developed between Uniform-Agri (Assen, the Netherlands) and Ghent University, was transferred towards [www.DairyDataWarehouse.com](http://www.DairyDataWarehouse.com) (2007-2013). Dairy Data Warehouse nowadays is a specialist dairy data company providing digital solutions for a sustainable, profitable future for dairy farmers and stakeholders throughout the dairy industry.
